info.title: Dishcraft API
info.description: API for discovering, authoring, and tweaking recipes.

get.description: Returns available recipe tags with optional pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

get.description: Returns the full recipe, including ingredients, equipment, steps, tags, and the authenticated user's cooking state.

timesCooked.description: An integer greater than or equal to zero.

get.description: Returns recipe previews with optional pagination, favorite, visibility, and tag filters.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

patch.description: Marks a recipe as favorited for the authenticated user and returns the updated recipe.

timesCooked.description: An integer greater than or equal to zero.

patch.description: Removes the authenticated user's favorite mark from a recipe and returns the updated recipe.

timesCooked.description: An integer greater than or equal to zero.

post.description: Records that the authenticated user cooked a recipe with a thumbs-up or thumbs-down rating.

get.description: Returns personalized recipe recommendations for the authenticated user, ordered by recommendation rank.

post.description: Generates a new recipe draft from an existing recipe or draft using an authenticated user's prompt.
Creates a recipe draft from edited recipe content and its source lineage.
Normalizes an authenticated user's recipe draft into a recipe and returns the created recipe.

timesCooked.description: An integer greater than or equal to zero.

get.description: Returns the profile and administrative status of the authenticated user.
Returns users and their tag affinities for an authenticated administrator.

post.description: Starts an administrator impersonation session for a target user.
Ends the authenticated administrator's active impersonation session.
